description_long: This house features a modern two-story design with a combination of light tan stonework on the lower level and horizontal wood paneling on the upper level. Large rectangular windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The roof is primarily flat, with a subtle overhang and a visible parapet around the upper story. The main entryway is understated, with a single wooden door and a small shrub accenting the front. The rear and side elevations show a mix of window sizes and placements, contributing to an asymmetrical yet balanced appearance. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, reflecting contemporary architectural trends.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, tan stonework on the lower level, wood paneling above, and large rectangular windows in an asymmetrical arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, a small shrub, and large windows on both levels with a clear view into the upper story.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive wood paneling, minimal windows, and the boxy upper story overhanging the stone base.
description_view_2: Rear view with multiple large windows and glass doors on the lower level, and a clear look at the flat roof and parapet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of window sizes, the stone lower level, and the wood-paneled upper story with minimal fenestration.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple wooden door with no porch, a small shrub accent, and no decorative overhang or columns
